landing.title: AI Customer Service Platform & CRM | Kustomer
landing.text:
AI Customer Service Platform & CRM | Kustomer
We value your privacy
We and
our 1717 partners
use cookies and other tracking technologies to improve your experience on our website. We may store and/or access information on a device and process personal data, such as your IP address and browsing data, for personalised advertising and content, advertising and content measurement, audience research and services development. Additionally, we may utilize precise geolocation data and identification through device scanning.
Please note that your choices apply across all our subdomains. Once you give consent, a floating button will appear at the bottom of your screen, allowing you to change or withdraw your consent at any time. We respect your choices and are committed to providing you with a transparent and secure browsing experience.
Customise
Reject All
Accept All
Customise Consent Preferences
Customise your consent preferences for Cookie Categories and advertising tracking preferences for Purposes & Features and Vendors below. You can give granular consent for each
Third Party Vendor
and
Google Ad Tech Provider
. Most vendors require explicit consent for personal data processing, while some rely on legitimate interest. However, you have the right to object to their use of legitimate interest. Additionally, please note that your preferences regarding purposes and vendors are saved in a cookie named 'euconsent' on your device and may be retained for up to 730 days to remember your choices.
Cookie Categories
Purposes & Features
Vendors
Cookie Categories
We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.
The cookies that are categorised as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ...
Show more
For more information on how Google's third-party cookies operate and handle your data, see:
Google Privacy Policy
Necessary
Always Active
Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.
Cookie
__cf_bm
Duration
1 hour
Description
This cookie, set by Cloudflare, is used to support Cloudflare Bot Management.
Cookie
hubspotutk
Duration
6 months
Description
HubSpot sets this cookie to keep track of the visitors to the website. This cookie is passed to HubSpot on form submission and used when deduplicating contacts.
Cookie
rc::a
Duration
Never Expires
Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.
Cookie
rc::c
Duration
session
Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.
Cookie
_GRECAPTCHA
Duration
6 months
Description
Google Recaptcha service sets this cookie to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.
Cookie
rc::f
Duration
Never Expires
Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.
Cookie
rc::b
Duration
session
Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.
Cookie
guest-session
Duration
session
Description
Cookie from Chilipiper that verifies current session and form fields to laucn the scheduler.
Cookie
euconsent
Duration
1 year
Description
CookieYes sets this cookie to store data when IAB TCF is enabled.
Cookie
cookietest
Duration
session
Description
The cookietest cookie is typically used to determine whether the user's browser accepts cookies, essential for website functionality and user experience.
Cookie
AWSALBCORS
Duration
7 days
Description
Amazon Web Services set this cookie for load balancing.
Cookie
cookieyes-*
Duration
1 year
Description
CookieYes sets this cookie for consent solution management.
Functional
Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.
Cookie
li_gc
Duration
6 months
Description
Linkedin set this cookie for storing visitor's consent regarding using cookies for non-essential purposes.
Cookie
lidc
Duration
1 day
Description
LinkedIn sets the lidc cookie to facilitate data center selection.
Cookie
ytidb::LAST_RESULT_ENTRY_KEY
Duration
Never Expires
Description
The cookie ytidb::LAST_RESULT_ENTRY_KEY is used by YouTube to store the last search result entry that was clicked by the user. This information is used to improve the user experience by providing more relevant search results in the future.
Cookie
em_cdn_uid
Duration
1 year
Description
This cookie is used to measure the number of times an embedded element from a third party service has been used.
Cookie
_dds_
Duration
Session
Description
Datadog session tracking/statistics
Cookie
AMP_b7cba2c14c
Duration
Session
Description
Hashed user session information
Cookie
AMP_MKTG_b7cba2c14c
Duration
Session
Description
Hashed recent campaign parameters
Cookie
AMP_unsent_b7cba2c14c
Duration
Session
Description
Hashed user session information
Cookie
__anon_id
Duration
Session
Description
Datadog session tracking/statistics
Cookie
visitorId
Duration
1 year
Description
ZoomInfo sets this cookie to identify a user.
Analytics
Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

Duration
1 day
Description

Duration
Never Expires
Description

Cookie
__hssrc
Duration
session
Description
This cookie is set by Hubspot whenever it changes the session cookie. The __hssrc cookie set to 1 indicates that the user has restarted the browser, and if the cookie does not exist, it is assumed to be a new session.
Cookie
__hssc
Duration
1 hour
Description
HubSpot sets this cookie to keep track of sessions and to determine if HubSpot should increment the session number and timestamps in the __hstc cookie.
Cookie
handl_landing_page
Duration
1 month
Description
HandL UTM Grabber plugin sets this cookie is used to record the very first page you visited on our site in your browser.
Cookie
handl_ip
Duration
1 month
Description
HandL UTM Grabber plugin sets this cookie to record the web browser's IP address.
Cookie
handl_url
Duration
1 month
Description
HandL UTM Grabber plugin sets this cookie to form the URL on which we placed the code that generates.
Cookie
handl_ref
Duration
1 month
Description
HandL UTM Grabber plugin sets this cookie to record the URL from which you came to our site.
Cookie
handl_original_ref
Duration
1 month
Description
HandL UTM Grabber plugin sets this cookie to record the URL from which you came to our site.
Cookie
_gcl_au
Duration
3 months
Description
Google Tag Manager sets the cookie to experiment advertisement efficiency of websites using their services.
Cookie
_ga_*
Duration
1 year 1 month 4 days
Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views.
Cookie
_ga
Duration
1 year 1 month 4 days
Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.
Cookie
handl_ref_domain
Duration
1 month
Description
Handl utm grabber sets this cookie to contain an ID for referral partners.
Cookie
_clck
Duration
1 year
Description
Microsoft Clarity sets this cookie to retain the browser's Clarity User ID and settings exclusive to that website. This guarantees that actions taken during subsequent visits to the same website will be linked to the same user ID.
Cookie
cb_group_id
Duration
1 year
Description
Clearbit sets this cookie to track page views and traits for Clearbit.
Cookie
cb_anonymous_id
Duration
1 year
Description
Clearbit sets this cookie to track page views and traits for Clearbit.
Cookie
_fbp
Duration
3 months
Description
Facebook sets this cookie to display advertisements when either on Facebook or on a digital platform powered by Facebook advertising after visiting the website.
Cookie
_clsk
Duration
1 day
Description
Microsoft Clarity sets this cookie to store and consolidate a user's pageviews into a single session recording.
Cookie
__hstc
Duration
6 months
Description
Hubspot set this main cookie for tracking visitors. It contains the domain, initial timestamp (first visit), last timestamp (last visit), current timestamp (this visit), and session number (increments for each subsequent session).
Cookie
__tld__
Duration
session
Description
tracking user interactions across different subdomains of a website
Cookie
cb%3Atest
Duration
1 year
Description
Clearbit sets this cookie to test analytic tracking
Cookie
pfjs%3Acookies
Duration
1 year
Description
Clearbit uses this cookie to determine if the browser supports cookies.
Cookie
_omappvp
Duration
11 years
Description
used for determining new vs. returning visitors.
Cookie
_omappvs
Duration
20 minutes
Description
used to determine when a new visitor becomes a returning visitor.

1 minute
Description

session

session

Cookie

Duration
1 month

No information
Cookie

Duration
6 months
Description
YouTube sets this cookie to manage feature rollout and experimentation. It helps Google control which new features or interface changes are shown to users as part of testing and staged rollouts, ensuring consistent experience for a given user during an experiment.
Cookie

Duration
session
Description

Duration
1 year 24 days
Description

7 days

cookie to track utm parameters

Duration
1 month
Description
Stores UTM parameters from URLs to track campaigns, attribute traffic sources, and prefill forms for marketing analytics and conversion attribution.
Performance
Performance cookies are used to understand and analyse the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.
Cookie
handlID
Duration
1 month
Description
Handl utm grabber sets this cookie to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
Cookie
_uetsid
Duration
1 day
Description
Bing Ads sets this cookie to engage with a user that has previously visited the website.
Cookie

1 year 24 days
Description

7 days

7 days

7 days
Description

Duration
11 years
Description
used for determining new vs. returning visitors.
Cookie

Duration
20 minutes
Description
used to determine when a new visitor becomes a returning visitor.

Duration
1 year
Description
Enables Sequel Video embeds, storing session identifiers, playback preferences, and interaction analytics to personalize experiences, measure engagement, and optimize performance.

docs.title: Kustomer Help Center
docs.text:
Kustomer Help Center
Need Help?
English (US)
Español
Português (BR)
How can we help you?
Search:
Popular search terms include:
chat
queues
metrics
search
Explore by Category
Get started
Learn more about Kustomer and get up to speed on system requirements, migration information, setting up your agents, and more.
Agent experience
Learn more about the tasks typically performed by agents.
Connect with customers
Provide multi-lingual support for your customers via various channels and help articles.
Route conversations or tasks to agents
Ensure customer questions are handled quickly and by the right agent.
Kustomer integrations
Connect Kustomer to a variety of services that let you better support customers.
Use business rules
Create business rules to help you manage common automations and improve your team's processes.
Manage your data
Learn how to manage your Kustomer data, customize user access, and more!
Reporting & analytics
Generate reports to gain insight on your conversations, team performance, and customer base.
Kustomer AI
Learn more about how to use AI to improve agent efficiency and provide better support.
Workflows
Create workflows to save time and eliminate the need for repetitive manual tasks.
Advanced administration
Set your team up for success by providing the tools they need to deliver the best support possible.
Advanced customizations
Take advantage of Kustomer's platform through workflows and integrations with other tools.

integrations.title: Integrations — Connect Your Stack | Kustomer
integrations.text:
Integrations — Connect Your Stack | Kustomer
We value your privacy
We and
our 1717 partners
use cookies and other tracking technologies to improve your experience on our website. We may store and/or access information on a device and process personal data, such as your IP address and browsing data, for personalised advertising and content, advertising and content measurement, audience research and services development. Additionally, we may utilize precise geolocation data and identification through device scanning.
Please note that your choices apply across all our subdomains. Once you give consent, a floating button will appear at the bottom of your screen, allowing you to change or withdraw your consent at any time. We respect your choices and are committed to providing you with a transparent and secure browsing experience.
Customise
Reject All
Accept All
Customise Consent Preferences
Customise your consent preferences for Cookie Categories and advertising tracking preferences for Purposes & Features and Vendors below. You can give granular consent for each
Third Party Vendor
and
Google Ad Tech Provider
. Most vendors require explicit consent for personal data processing, while some rely on legitimate interest. However, you have the right to object to their use of legitimate interest. Additionally, please note that your preferences regarding purposes and vendors are saved in a cookie named 'euconsent' on your device and may be retained for up to 730 days to remember your choices.
Cookie Categories
Purposes & Features
Vendors
Cookie Categories
We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.
The cookies that are categorised as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ...
Show more
For more information on how Google's third-party cookies operate and handle your data, see:
Google Privacy Policy
Necessary
Always Active
Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

hits.title: Facebook Nears Purchase of Kustomer in Deal That Values It at $1B
Facebook Buys Customer-Service Software Maker Kustomer
Kustomer Raises $35M Series C – Challenging Salesforce and Zendesk
Kustomer Embarks on a New Chapter as a Standalone Company
Meta Looks to Divest Kustomer Amid Efficiency Drive
Meta acquires Kustomer, a CRM/Helpdesk software company
EU opens in-depth investigation into acquisition of Kustomer by Facebook

analysis.name: Kustomer
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered customer service platform and CRM combining omnichannel support, workflows, and AI agents in a unified system.
analysis.ideal_customer: B2C brands in retail, travel, finance, health & wellness, and B2B tech that need high-volume, unified customer service with strong AI automation

features.name: crm
features.description: Customer relationship management as the core data layer for support

features.name: omnichannel messaging
features.description: Unified support across multiple communication channels

features.name: reporting and analytics
features.description: Reports on conversations, team performance, and customers
features.evidence_quote: Generate reports to gain insight on your conversations, team performance, and customer base.

features.name: workflows
features.description: Automations to eliminate repetitive manual tasks
features.evidence_quote: Create workflows to save time and eliminate the need for repetitive manual tasks.

features.evidence_quote: Create business rules to help you manage common automations and improve your team's processes.

features.description: Help articles and self-service content
features.evidence_quote: support for your customers via various channels and help articles.

features.description: Customer self-service solutions

features.description: Outreach and proactive customer service capability

features.description: Unified agent desktop for customer conversations
features.evidence_quote: Agent experience … tasks typically performed by agents.

features.evidence_quote: Connect Kustomer to a variety of services that let you better support customers.

features.name: developer api

features.evidence_quote: Advanced administration … Set your team up for success

features.name: advanced customizations

features.evidence_quote: Advanced customizations … Take advantage of Kustomer's platform through workflows and integrations

features.name: b2b tech vertical solution
features.description: Solution package for B2B tech companies

features.name: retail vertical solution
features.description: Solution package for retail brands

features.name: travel vertical solution
features.description: Solution package for travel companies

features.name: finance vertical solution

features.name: health and wellness vertical solution
features.description: Solution package for health & wellness brands

features.name: security and compliance
features.description: Platform security offering

features.name: gdpr and ccpa compliance
features.description: Data privacy compliance surface

features.name: migration tools

features.evidence_quote: system requirements, migration information, setting up your agents

features.name: trust hub / status
features.description: Trust center and public status page
features.evidence_quote: Trust Hub Status Trust Center Privacy Center Legal Center

differentiators: CRM-based customer service platform (unified customer timeline vs. ticket-based helpdesks)
Native AI suite branded across Concierge, Envoy, Architect, and Data Explorer
Explicit head-to-head positioning against Zendesk, Intercom, Gorgias, Salesforce, Freshdesk, Oracle, and Gladly

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned only cookie-consent boilerplate; no visible tier prices scraped. Kustomer is historically contact-sales / annual-contract only.
